scripts.build:web:prod: cross-env REACT_APP_API_URL=%npm_config_apiurl% npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.deploy:firebase: npm run build:web && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:firebase:prod: cross-env REACT_APP_API_URL=%npm_config_apiurl% npm --prefix frontend run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:preview: cross-env REACT_APP_API_URL=%npm_config_apiurl% npm --prefix frontend run build && npx firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 7d
scripts.deploy:preview:qa: cross-env REACT_APP_API_URL=%npm_config_apiurl% npm --prefix frontend run build && npx firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy qa --expires 14d
scripts.deploy:backend:cloudrun: gcloud run deploy pos-billing-api --source backend --region asia-south1 --allow-unauthenticated
